title: PVP NootyPack
description: Resource pack for pvp battles from the author of SayNooty
body:
**PVP NootyPack** - The resource pack is designed for battles against players. The author of this resource pack, set it up for himself for pvp battles. The author wants to share this resource pack with you, if suddenly someone liked it.

You can fight with this resource pack in various mini-games, such as: **BedWars**, **SkyWars**.
#
**Tools:**

![tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f1395d725d1721b7227db0219275a767fce54e.png)
